mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluations (appointment_id, student_feedback, coach_feedback, create_time) VALUES (#{appointmentId}, #{studentFeedback}, #{coachFeedback}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT e.* FROM evaluations e LEFT JOIN appointments a ON e.appointment_id = a.id WHERE a.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC
SELECT e.* FROM evaluations e LEFT JOIN appointments a ON e.appointment_id = a.id WHERE a.coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY e.create_time DESC

SELECT e.* FROM evaluations e LEFT JOIN appointments a ON e.appointment_id = a.id WHERE a.student_id = #{studentId} AND a.status = 2 -- 已完成状态 AND (e.student_feedback IS NULL OR e.student_feedback = '') ORDER BY a.end_time DESC

SELECT e.* FROM evaluations e LEFT JOIN appointments a ON e.appointment_id = a.id WHERE a.coach_id = #{coachId} AND a.status = 2 -- 已完成状态 AND (e.coach_feedback IS NULL OR e.coach_feedback = '') ORDER BY a.end_time DESC
